zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes von Kleve於1232年出生在可列福時，她的父親Dietrich VI. von Kleve48歲，母親Hedwig von Meißen27歲。她和Bernhard IV. zur Lippe至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1285年8月1日在德國享年53歲，埋葬在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 奧斯納布呂克貝森布盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes von Kleve于1232年出生在可列福时，她的父亲Dietrich VI. von Kleve48岁，母亲Hedwig von Meißen27岁。她和Bernhard IV. zur Lippe至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1285年8月1日在德国享年53岁，埋葬在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 奧斯納布呂克貝森布盧可。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Kleve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Kleve (earlier Cleve) in Lower Rhineland, Westphalia, or Schleswig-Holstein. The placename probably derives from an old topographic term cleve ‘swamp’. Compare Cleve .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads named Kleiva, from Old Norse kleif, klif ‘cliff, rocky ascent with a road or path’.

variants.name: Klever
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Kurt, Ulrike.
German and Dutch: habitational name for someone from Kleve in the Rhineland or Schleswig-Holstein (see   Kleve   1).

German: from Middle Low German klēver ‘clover, meadow’, also ‘resin, turpentine’, hence a metonymic occupational name either for a farmer who grew clover or for someone who collected resin and distilled turpentine. In the Alemannic area this was also a nickname for a bungler. Compare Cleaver and Clever .

variants.name: Kleven
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Berger, Hjalmer, Jalmer, Knute, Maren, Obert, Thor, Thorval.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads all over Norway named Kleven, from the definite singular form of   Kleve  . Compare   Cleven   and   Cleveland  .
Dutch and German: rare variant of   Cleven  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes von Kleve was born in 1232, in Cleves, her father, Dietrich VI. von Kleve, was 48 and her mother, Hedwig von Meißen, was 27. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Bernhard IV. zur Lippe. She died on 1 August 1285, in Germany, at the age of 53, and was buried in Bersenbrück, Osnabrück, Lower Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes von Kleve est née en 1232, à Kleve, son père, Dietrich VI. von Kleve, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Hedwig von Meißen, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Bernhard IV. zur Lippe. Elle est décédée le 1 août 1285, à Allemagne, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Bersenbrück, Landkreis Osnabrück, Niedersachsen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes von Kleve 1232 in Kleve geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dietrich VI. von Kleve 48 und ihre Mutter Hedwig von Meißen 27. Sie hatte mit Bernhard IV. zur Lippe mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. August 1285 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Deutschland und wurde in Bersenbrück, Landkreis Osnabrück, Niedersachsen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes von Kleve è nata il nel 1232 nel Kleve, sua padre, Dietrich VI. von Kleve, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Hedwig von Meißen, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Bernhard IV. zur Lippe. Morì il 1 agosto 1285, nel Germania, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Bersenbrück, Landkreis Osnabrück, Niedersachsen, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes von Kleve(이)가 1232년 클브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dietrich VI. von Kleve(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hedwig von Meißen(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Bernhard IV. zur Lippe(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1285년 8월 1일 독일에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 오스나브uc크 버센브uc크에 묻혔다.

Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Bernhard IV. zur Lippe. Ela faleceu em 1 de agosto de 1285, em Alemanha, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Bersenbrück, Landkreis Osnabrück, Niedersachsen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes von Kleve родилась в 1232 г. в местности клив, её отцу по имени Dietrich VI. von Kleve было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Hedwig von Meißen, 27. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Bernhard IV. zur Lippe. Она умерла 1 августа 1285 г. в местности Германия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности бирсенбрuкк, ландкрис оснабрuкк, ниедирсачсен, Германия.
